name: Ortega Chile Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Add unpeeled potatoes and cook until just tender, about 20-30 minutes depending on size.
2. Drain the potatoes and allow them to cool slightly. Cut into 1-inch chunks.
3. Heat olive oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat.
4. Saute chopped onions until softened, about 5 minutes.
5. Add garlic and stir for 1 minute.
6. Add potato chunks, salt, and pepper. Stir frequently.
7. Cook the potatoes for another 10-12 minutes or until they are crisp and brown on all sides.
8. Stir in chopped green chilies and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
9. Transfer mixture to a serving dish. Sprinkle grated cheese evenly over top.
10. Cover tightly with foil and turn off heat.
11. Let sit for 2 minutes so the cheese melts.
Makes 8 servings.
